section.heading: Delegation of authority
section.chapeau: The Secretary of Transportation may delegate to an agency, a State, or a qualified person the authority to—

paragraph.content: establish and maintain the vessel identification system; and
charge fees under section 12505 of this title to a person making information available to or requesting information from the vessel identification system.

note.heading: Historical and Revision Notes
note.p: This section allows the Secretary to delegate the authority to establish and maintain the vessel identification system to an agency, a State, or a qualified person. The Secretary may also delegate the authority to charge fees under section 12505 for requesting information from or making information available to the vessel identification system.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Jan. 1, 1989, with certain exceptions and qualifications, see section 107 of Pub. L. 100–710, set out as a note under section 31301 of this title.
